ddls:
CREATE TABLE "texts" (
  "text_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each text */,
  "text_title" TEXT /* Title of the text */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the author of the text */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date of publication */,
  "text_content" TEXT /* Full content of the text */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the text */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Publisher of the text */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the text */,
  "total_words" INTEGER /* Total number of words in the text */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the text was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the text was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("text_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_texts_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Name of the author */,
  "author_bio" TEXT /* Biographical information about the author */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Author's birth date */,
  "death_date" TEXT /* Author's death date */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the author was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the author was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "word_frequencies" (
  "word_frequency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each word frequency entry */,
  "text_id" INTEGER /* ID of the text */,
  "word" TEXT /* The word */,
  "word_count" INTEGER /* Frequency of the word in the text */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the word frequency was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the word frequency was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("word_frequency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_word_frequencies_text_id FOREIGN KEY ("text_id") REFERENCES texts ("text_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tf_idf_scores" (
  "tf_idf_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each TF-IDF score entry */,
  "text_id" INTEGER /* ID of the text */,
  "word" TEXT /* The word */,
  "tf_idf_score" REAL /* TF-IDF score of the word in the text */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the TF-IDF score was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the TF-IDF score was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tf_idf_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tf_idf_scores_text_id FOREIGN KEY ("text_id") REFERENCES texts ("text_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, editor, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the user's password */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the text */,
  "text_id" INTEGER /* ID of the text being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the text was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_text_id FOREIGN KEY ("text_id") REFERENCES texts ("text_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "text_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "text_id" INTEGER /* ID of the text */,
  "key" TEXT /* Key of the metadata */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metadata was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metadata was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_text_metadata_text_id FOREIGN KEY ("text_id") REFERENCES texts ("text_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role assignment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role assignment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "search_queries" (
  "query_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each search query */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the query */,
  "query_text" TEXT /* Text of the search query */,
  "query_date" TEXT /* Date when the query was made */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the query was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the query was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("query_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_search_queries_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "query_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each query result */,
  "query_id" INTEGER /* ID of the search query */,
  "text_id" INTEGER /* ID of the text that matches the query */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the result */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the result was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the result was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_query_results_text_id FOREIGN KEY ("text_id") REFERENCES texts ("text_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_query_results_query_id FOREIGN KEY ("query_id") REFERENCES search_queries ("query_id")
)
